entries.title: Built-in synthetic IPL and XDF
entries.notes: Self-authored public software generated in-browser. Validates CPU execution, CRTC raster IRQ, GVRAM/TVRAM/sprite composition, HD63450 DMA, FDC/XDF, SASI or internal SCSI/HDF, YM2151, MSM6258, MIDI and the render path without copyrighted assets.

entries.title: Cho Ren Sha 68K ver1.10
entries.notes: Manual regression for SHA-256 6d8169ef89654fd7986b65eecfb5444dc496ac8e2f888b385a6b531ea3ef2146. Boots past the 128 KiB fixed-buffer message to the credits screen and accepts X68000 Space make/break input to reach the ver1.10 information screen. CI covers the underlying active-low MFP GPIP HSync edges with a synthetic bus test; the disk image is never committed.
